meaning: n.拉普兰(挪威、瑞典、芬兰和苏联各国北部拉普兰人居住的地区)
examples: "Poor thing," said the Lapland woman, "you have far to run still."
She is no doubt gone to Lapland; for there is always snow and ice there.
Here the first vegetation peeped forth; here Kay and Gerda took leave of the Lapland woman.
Despite the introduction of cars, the most useful motorised vehicle in Finnish Lapland is the skimobile.
The company behind the theme park, Lapland Newforest Ltd, went into liquidation, jurors heard.
